creator: edgeman@gmail.com
text:
I am unable to update this package, the build fails in "Staging".
Looking at portsmon it looks like the same thing is happening there:
http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101amd64-default/389291/logs/errors/py27-libtorrent-rasterbar-1.0.4.log
From http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=net-p2p&portname=libtorrent-rasterbar-python

Last error is:
"/usr/bin/strip  /usr/ports/net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar-python/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libtorrent-rasterbar.so.8    
/usr/bin/strip: '/usr/ports/net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar-python/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libtorrent-rasterbar.so.8': No such file   
*** Error code 1 "
